where.if: AND ( LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(summary) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(description) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM projects WHERE featured = 1 ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM projects ORDER BY start_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (name, description, summary, cover, git_url, demo_url, featured, start_date, end_date, tech_stack, dev_process, screenshots, timeline) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{gitUrl}, #{demoUrl}, #{featured}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{techStackJson}, #{devProcessJson}, #{screenshotsJson}, #{timelineJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, summary = #{summary}, cover = #{cover}, git_url = #{gitUrl}, demo_url = #{demoUrl}, featured = #{featured}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, tech_stack = #{techStackJson}, dev_process = #{devProcessJson}, screenshots = #{screenshotsJson}, timeline = #{timelineJson} WHERE id = #{id}
